description: v2 feature spec for multi-objective Pareto utility ranking (Function 3). Adds three liquidity cost features to v1 layout. Target is utility_score = alpha*norm_savings - (1-alpha)*norm_liquidity_cost. Rules engine remains authoritative; ML only re-ranks compliant strategies.

targets.description: alpha * (savings_lkr / gross_income) - (1-alpha) * (liquidity_cost_lkr / gross_income). Default alpha=0.7. Dimensionless; higher is better. Not used as input (no leakage).
targets.description_secondary: v1 target retained for comparison; use v1 feature spec when training this.

features.name: annual_gross_income
features.meaning: Profile annual gross (salary + business + other) in LKR.

features.name: annual_salary_income
features.meaning: Annual salary income component in LKR.

features.name: n_ordered_relief_codes
features.meaning: Total relief codes in the active grid.

features.name: n_included_relief_codes
features.meaning: Relief codes included in this candidate (0..n_ordered).

features.name: candidate_mask
features.meaning: Integer bitmask index from candidate_id suffix.

features.name: total_tax_lkr
features.meaning: Deterministic total APIT for this candidate after compliance.

features.name: liquidity_cost_lkr
features.meaning: Weighted cash outflow required to claim all included reliefs: sum(claimed_cap * RELIEF_LIQUIDITY_WEIGHT). Weights: retirement/life_ins/charitable=1.0, health_ins=0.8, home_loan=0.1, rent=0.0.

features.name: liquidity_to_income_ratio
features.meaning: liquidity_cost_lkr / annual_gross_income (0..1 scale). Captures proportional financial strain relative to income level.

features.name: n_high_cost_reliefs
features.meaning: Count of reliefs in this candidate with RELIEF_LIQUIDITY_WEIGHT >= 0.8 (retirement, life_ins, charitable, health_ins).

version_lock: Must match best_model_summary.json field feature_version exactly.
